title: borreria lancea
intro: Borreria lancea, also known as lance-leaf borreria, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Borreria lancea can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional remedies in various forms, such as teas and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
